query:
ALTER TABLE users 
  ADD COLUMN stripe_customer_id varchar(120) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN stripe_subscription_id varchar(120) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN subscription_tier enum('free','receipts','goblin_pro','founding','founders_circle') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'free',
  ADD COLUMN subscription_status enum('active','trialing','past_due','cancelled','none') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none',
  ADD COLUMN goblin_credits int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN goblin_used_this_month int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN goblin_free_used int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;

  ADD COLUMN subscription_tier enum('free','receipts','goblin_pro','founding','founders_circle') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'free',
  ADD COLUMN subscription_status enum('active','trialing','past_due','cancelled','none') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none',
  ADD COLUMN goblin_credits int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
